info.title: Algorithmic Trading Bot API
info.description:
Production-grade cryptocurrency algorithmic trading bot API. Provides endpoints for managing trading strategies, monitoring performance, viewing trade history, and accessing backtest results. 

**Core Strategy:** Bollinger Bands Mean Reversion on BTC/USDT and ETH/USDT pairs. 

**Risk Management:** Maximum 2% risk per trade, 25% max drawdown limit, circuit breakers enabled.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User authentication and token management endpoints

tags.name: System
tags.description: System information and exchange connectivity checks

tags.name: Trading Strategy
tags.description: Endpoints for managing and monitoring algorithmic trading strategies

put.summary: Update a saved exchange connection for the current user

delete.summary: Delete a saved exchange connection for the current user

post.description: Stops the trading strategy for the specified account, closes all open positions, and calculates final PnL. If no accountId is provided, stops the most recently created account.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

post.description: Initializes a new trading account with specified parameters and starts the trading strategy. Creates an account with the given initial balance, risk parameters, and trading pairs.

requestBody.description: Strategy configuration including initial balance, trading pairs, and risk parameters

get.summary: List saved exchange connections for the current user

post.summary: Create a saved exchange connection for the current user
Activate a saved exchange connection for the current user

post.description: Get a new access token using a valid refresh token
Authenticate user with username and password, returns JWT access and refresh tokens

get.description: Retrieves one historical trade by ID, with optional account scoping for safer lookup flows.

parameters.name: tradeId
parameters.description: Trade ID

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Optional account scope for the trade lookup

get.description: Returns recent completed trades with entry/exit details and P&L.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment mode: test or live

parameters.name: X-Environment
parameters.description: Environment mode header: test or live

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trades to return

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

get.description: Retrieves historical trades with optional filters for account, symbol, and date range. Returns detailed information about each trade including entry/exit prices, PnL, fees, and slippage.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter by account ID

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Filter by trading pair symbol

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter trades after this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter trades before this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (max: 1000)

get.summary: Get strategy status and performance metrics
get.description: Retrieves current status and performance metrics for a trading account including PnL, Sharpe ratio, drawdown, open positions, and win rate. If no accountId is provided, returns status for the most recently created account.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

get.description: Returns all open positions with unrealized P&L.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment mode: test or live

parameters.name: X-Environment
parameters.description: Environment mode header: test or live

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

get.description: Retrieves historical backtest results with optional filters for strategy and symbol. Returns comprehensive performance metrics including Sharpe ratio, profit factor, win rate, and validation status.

parameters.name: strategyId
parameters.description: Filter by strategy ID

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Filter by trading pair symbol

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Retrieve information about the currently authenticated user
Returns performance metrics for specified timeframe: today, week, month, or all-time.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment mode: test or live

parameters.name: X-Environment
parameters.description: Environment mode header: test or live

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Timeframe: today, week, month, all-time

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

get.description: Returns account balance with asset breakdown. Supports test and live environments.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment mode: test or live

parameters.name: X-Environment
parameters.description: Environment mode header: test or live

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (optional, defaults to latest account)

StopStrategyResponse.description: Response after stopping a trading strategy

StartStrategyRequest.description: Request to start a new trading strategy

pairs.description: List of trading pairs to trade

riskPerTrade.description: Risk per trade as a decimal (0.02 = 2%)

maxDrawdown.description: Maximum drawdown limit as a decimal (0.25 = 25%)

StartStrategyResponse.description: Response after starting a trading strategy

StrategyStatusResponse.description: Current status and performance metrics of a trading strategy

BacktestResultResponse.description: Backtest result with comprehensive performance metrics
